name: NEXUS Club New York
address: 100 Church St 7th Floor, New York, NY 10007
about: NEXUS Club New York is a luxury venue offering a curated collection of amenities, spaces, and services in Downtown Manhattan. It features state-of-the-art Full Swing Sports Simulators for golf and other sports, alongside fitness and wellness centers, dining options, and event spaces. The club is designed for families and members seeking exclusive experiences, providing access to global properties and private clubs through a membership model.
why_golfers_like_it: Global access to NEXUS Club locations

food_and_drink.notes: Casual and fine dining available, including a dedicated cafe and restaurant
Intimate ROSÉ Champagne bar and other beverage options

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with advanced tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience, though rental options may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the club offers on-site dining and beverage services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator take approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, NEXUS Club New York is family-friendly with dedicated children's areas, including The Kid's Club and The Den for Teens.
